name: fhevm-skill
description: Production-ready AI agent skill for the Zama Protocol (FHEVM). Drop into Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, or OpenClaw and your agent gains full knowledge of confidential smart contract development: encrypted types, FHE operations, ACL, input proofs, user/public/oracle decryption, ERC-7984, Hardhat testing, frontend integration, security, and 15+ anti-patterns.
author: Nith567

scripts.postinstall:
node -e "console.log('
📚 fhevm-skill installed. Copy SKILL.md to your AI agent skills directory:
  Claude Code:  ~/.claude/skills/fhevm-skill/
  OpenClaw:     ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/fhevm-skill/
  Cursor/Windsurf: reference SKILL.md from your project rules.
')"
